description: Archive report emitted by edgp archive-bundle after verifying and packaging an EDGP static report bundle.

archive.description: Archive path requested by the caller.

archiveSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the written archive, or null when verification failed and no archive was produced.

bundleDir.description: Resolved bundle directory that was archived.

bundleSha256.description: Verified bundle fingerprint from the bundle manifest, or null when the manifest could not provide one.

ok.description: True when bundle verification succeeded and the archive was written.

files.description: Number of bundle files included in the archive.

verificationFailures.description: Number of bundle verification failures seen before archiving.

verification.description: Embedded edgp.report.bundle.verification.v1 result used as the archive gate.

title: EDGP Report Bundle Archive v1
